name: ocentra-enforcer
description: Standalone enforcement system with indexed Rust, TypeScript, Python, common hard-fail rules, harness diagnostics, validator CLI, Codex skill, and MCP adapter.

interface.longDescription: Run strict indexed Rust, TypeScript, Python, security, generated-artifact, and harness diagnostics checks by file, crate/package, diff, or workspace through a CLI, Codex skill, or MCP server.
defaultPrompt: Validate this change with Ocentra Enforcer.
Run Ocentra Enforcer against this file, crate, or package.
Run this failing check through the Ocentra Enforcer harness and summarize the compact diagnostics.
